title: Boefje
writer: J.M. Brusse, Carl Zuckmayer, Curt Alexander
actors: Annie van Ees, Albert van Dalsum, Enny Snijders
plot: Twelve year old Jan Grovers spends more time in the alleys of Rotterdam than with his family (though he occasionally looks after his tree younger sisters, all of whom are called Mientje). Together with his best friend and partner ...
